title: Login flow — implementation plan
subtitle: v1 · magic-link
plan:
## Goal

Ship passwordless email login for the v1 B2C web client. Magic-link only; server session in an httpOnly cookie.

## Approach

1. **Issue token** — `POST /auth/request` generates a single-use, 15-minute token, stores its hash, emails the link.
2. **Consume token** — `GET /auth/callback?token=…` verifies the hash, creates a server session, sets an httpOnly cookie, redirects to the app.
3. **Session** — server-side session store keyed by an opaque id; revocable on logout.

## Files touched

- `auth/router.ts` — the two new routes.
- `auth/token.ts` — token issue/verify (hash with SHA-256, constant-time compare).
- `auth/session.ts` — session create/destroy.
- `mail/templates/magic-link.html` — the email.

## Risks

- Token replay if the hash store is not cleared on use — delete on first successful consume.
- Email deliverability is out of scope for v1; assume the existing transactional provider.

## Out of scope

Password auth, SSO, and account recovery — none ship in v1.
